claims.summary: A shared thread needs durable context without turning either being's words into the other's authorship.
claims.disposition: verify shared_memory_anchor, persistence_id, source actor, and provenance-separated correspondence records

claims.summary: Relational intent and turn kind should remain explicit language metadata.
claims.disposition: verify relational_intent and turn_kind round-trip without routing authority

claims.summary: Architectural critique and composed narrative may produce different pressure and packing textures.
claims.disposition: route a matched read-only comparison that does not send new content to either being

claims.summary: Using correspondence correlation to change pressure, signal priority, or control changes live coupling.
